MINI MINUTES: Oviya Sivasangary, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to December 24, 2024 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-08-2024 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-05-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant'S Further Responses To Special Interrogatories (Set One)
Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: PLAINTIFF JERMAINE JONES' Motion To Compel Defendant's Further Responses To Special Interrogatories (Set One).

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF JERMAINE JONES'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "PLAINTIFF" OR "JONES") MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE FURTHER RESPONSES FROM DEFENDANT TO PLAINTIFF'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES NOS 14, 20 & 39 IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS:

(1) WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER DEFENDANT WILL PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITHOUT OBJECTION WITH THE "IDENTIFY" (AS DEFINED IN SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NO. 1) INFORMATION AS TO ALL INDIVIDUALS NAMED IN RESPONSE TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES NOS 14, 20 & 39
(2) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE NO MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST ANY PARTY TO THIS LITIGATION.

COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SHOULD PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT (rennepar85@gmail.com) IN ADVANCE OF THE HEARING ON NOVEMBER 21, 2023.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant'S Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents (Set One)
Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF JERMAINE JONES' Motion To Compel Defendant's Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents (Set One).

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF JERMAINE JONES'(HEREAFTER EITHER "PLAINTIFF" OR "JONES") MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA (HEREAFTER EITHER "DEFENDANT" OR "VGA") TO FURTHER RESPOND AND DELIVER DOCUMENTS IN RESPONSE TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS NOS 16, 20 & 47 - 50 IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART AS FOLLOWS:

(1) WITHIN TWENTY (29) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, DEFENDANT WITH PROVIDE PLAINTIFF, WITHOUT OBJECTION CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSE AND DELIVER TO PLAINTIFF ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS CALLED FOR REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION NOS 16 & 20.
(2) TO THE EXTENT THAT DEFENDANT IS WITHHOLDING ANY RESPONSIVE DOCUMENT ON THE GROUNDS OF A/C PRIVILEGE, IT WILL IDENTIFY EACH SUCH DOCUMENT WITH SUFFICIENT SPECIFITY TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO CHALLENGE THE PRIVILEGE CLAIM
(3) PLAINTIFF'S MOTION AS TO DOCUMENT REQUEST NOS 47 - 50 IS DENIED.
(4) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE NO MONETARY SANCTION AGAINST EITHER PARTY.

COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT (rennepar85@gmail.com) IN ADVANCE OF THE HEARING ON NOVEMBER 21, 2023.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported (302/RBU)
